info.name: Moonwell Pilgrim
info.description: The Moonwell Pilgrim background from Forgotten Realms: Heroes of Faerûn.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Quarterstaff, Painter’s Supplies, Bedroll, Bell, Pouch, Robe, String, Traveler’s Clothes, Waterskin, 34 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: Like many who hail from the Moonshae Isles, you grew up revering the blessed land, its unique gods, and the mysterious shrines called the moonwells. As a moonwell pilgrim, you undertook a quest to visit and commune with every moonwell on (or off) the map. Along your idyllic journeys, you collected a repertoire of Moonshavian folk songs, painted landscapes of enchanting vistas, and even learned how to wield a bit of primal magic.

setters.set: Constitution, Wisdom, Charisma, Magic Initiate (Druid) Feat, Nature and Performance Skills, and Painter’s Supplies
